settings.text:
We're thrilled that you've chosen to invite your Valentine to experience Yoé and embrace a new era of elevated clean beauty.

Your information has been successfully submitted, and your Valentine will receive an exclusive voucher on February 14th to select their favourite Yoé product.
Complete these simple questions and we’ll send them a full-size Yoé product, on us!

settings.custom_liquid:
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    setTimeout(function () {
        let hashValue = window.location.hash.substring(1);
        let extractedId = hashValue.match(/^\d+/);

        if (extractedId) {
            let orderId = extractedId[0];
            let inputField = document.getElementById("Order_ID_01JJWAQ4C9KYMWKTF644DZTANN");
            if (inputField) {
                inputField.value = orderId;
                inputField.disabled = true;
            }
        }
    }, 3000);
});


</script>

<style>
#Order_ID_01JJWAQY9S3K2QJ46DYPGYBB3T, #label-Order_ID_01JJWAQY9S3K2QJ46DYPGYBB3T{
display: none!important;
}
